summary: SK-10 (valid user login, Jira Mode B) — pure happy-path E2E slice against Saucedemo. Three tests (TC-001 valid login reaches inventory, TC-002 product list visible, TC-003 no error on success) all passed live: 0 failures, 0 bug drafts. Locators were verified live via the playwright-test MCP before authoring. Scope was happy-path only by design; negative login cases belong to sibling stories SK-11 / SK-12.
release_recommendation_reasoning: All three risks are covered_passing. The high-severity RISK-001 (a valid user cannot log in) is covered by TC-001, which passed live: login reaches /inventory.html. RISK-002 (logged in but no usable inventory) is covered by TC-001 + TC-002 (product list renders, 'Products' title visible). RISK-003 (spurious error on success) is covered by TC-003 (no [data-test=error] element on the success page). No blocking failures, no flakes, no skipped or unexecuted cases. This is an E2E-only story (Saucedemo exposes no backend API seam for login), so the flat execution_summary form is used.
